decision_rule: Clicked products without real affiliate links are fixed first.
If there are no clicks yet, create the first real affiliate link for next_action.
After publishing, export the hidden ?ops=1 click CSV and import it weekly.
Keep cat-fit, no-buy, and safety notes visible before pushing product links.
